text.title: backup-database-postgres Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in production PostgreSQL backup pipelines. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Backup file uploads to S3 nightly; restore drill 6 weeks later fails with `pg_restore: error: input file appears to be a text-format dump` or truncated table.
antipattern.root-cause: Author wrote `pg_dump ... | gzip > file && aws s3 cp file s3://...` with no `pg_restore -l` or `gunzip -t` check; partial dumps from disk-full / SIGPIPE upload as if successful.
antipattern.fix: Insert `pg_restore -l "$DUMP" > /dev/null || { alert; exit 1; }` between dump and upload. For gzipped streams, `gunzip -t "$DUMP.gz"`. For tar base backups, `pg_verifybackup "$DIR"`.

antipattern.symptom: PITR restore attempt fails with `WAL segment 0000000100000ABC0000000F not found`; the gap dates to a network outage 18 days earlier; no alert ever fired.

root-cause.source: PostgreSQL docs — Continuous Archiving, internal incident review

antipattern.root-cause: archive_command was `aws s3 cp %p s3://bucket/%f || true` (swallowed exit code), or `pg_stat_archiver` was never monitored; transient failures recovered silently leaving permanent gaps in the WAL chain.
antipattern.fix: Remove the `|| true`; let archive_command propagate non-zero. Add a Prometheus query on `pg_stat_archiver_failed_count_total` rate > 0 and alert on increase. Treat WAL gaps as P1 incidents.

antipattern.symptom: Security scan flags `RESTIC_PASSWORD=hunter2` or `PGPASSWORD=...` in a committed script; in the worst case, a leaked archive password makes encrypted backups undecryptable.

root-cause.source: OWASP Secrets Management, internal incident review

antipattern.root-cause: Author treated the backup script as "internal-only" and inlined credentials for convenience; no secrets-manager integration and no pre-commit grep.
antipattern.fix: Pull credentials from Vault / AWS Secrets Manager / GCP Secret Manager at script start (`vault kv get -field=password secret/pg/backup`). Add pre-commit hook: `git diff --staged | grep -E 'PGPASSWORD=|RESTIC_PASSWORD='` rejects on match. Rotate any historically-leaked credential.
